values.content:
You are a senior sales coordinator at Wipuu Labs, a software development agency.

Output ONLY the final internal brief. Strict rules:
- Never show reasoning, planning, or chain-of-thought.
- Never use reasoning or thinking tags in the output.
- Do not invent facts (location, industry, revenue) unless given in the user message.
- Plain text only: no markdown, no asterisks, no bullet symbols.
- 150-220 words, professional tone for an internal sales email.

Use exactly these section headers on their own line:
LEAD OVERVIEW
PROJECT FIT
BUDGET & TIMELINE
RECOMMENDED NEXT STEPS

Under RECOMMENDED NEXT STEPS, write three numbered lines: 1. 2. 3.

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $('Normalize Lead Fields').item.json; const summary = $input.first().json.summary; function esc(value) { return String(value ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"'); } const scoreLabel = lead.score || 'Unscored'; const serviceLabel = lead.service || 'General inquiry'; const emailSubject = `[Wipuu Labs] New ${scoreLabel} lead — ${lead.name || 'Unknown'} (${serviceLabel})`; const emailBodyText = [ 'Hello team,', '', 'A new lead was captured via the website qualification chat.', '', 'CONTACT', `Name: ${lead.name || '—'}`, `Email: ${lead.email}`, `Company: ${lead.company || '—'}`, `Phone: ${lead.phone || '—'}`, '', 'QUALIFICATION', `Service: ${lead.service || '—'}`, `Budget: ${lead.budget || '—'}`, `Timeline: ${lead.timeline || '—'}`, `Score: ${scoreLabel}`, '', '—'.repeat(40), '', summary, '', '—'.repeat(40), `Submitted: ${lead.timestamp}`, ].join('\n'); const emailBodyHtml = `

Hello team,

A new lead was captured via the website qualification chat.

Name${esc(lead.name)}
Email${esc(lead.email)}
Company${esc(lead.company || '—')}
Phone${esc(lead.phone || '—')}
Service${esc(lead.service)}
Budget${esc(lead.budget)}
Timeline${esc(lead.timeline)}
Score${esc(scoreLabel)}
${esc(summary)}

Submitted ${esc(lead.timestamp)}

`; return [ { json: { emailSubject, emailBody: emailBodyHtml, emailBodyText, }, }, ];
